overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path during golden hour. The character travels from a grim dead tree with hanged bodies toward a medieval village with wooden thatched-roof houses, passing wooden fences and a roadside gallows along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path near dead tree with hanged bodies

events.description: large dead tree with multiple hanged bodies passes out of view to the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path away from the ominous dead tree, heading toward the distant village

entered.detail: large dead tree with bare branches and multiple bodies hanging from ropes
several corpses suspended from the tree branches
worn dirt trail winding through grassy terrain
rustic wooden post fence running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing near a large dead tree with multiple hanged bodies suspended from its branches, bathed in warm golden hour light. He walks forward along a dirt trail bordered by wooden fences on the right and open grasslands on the left, with the grim tree gradually receding into the background as distant village structures become visible.

events.description: wooden gallows with hanged figure becomes visible ahead on the path
passing the wooden gallows structure on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rural path toward the village, passing the roadside gallows

entered.detail: tall wooden T-shaped gallows structure beside the path
single corpse hanging from the gallows post
cluster of medieval wooden buildings with thatched roofs
dark smoke rising from somewhere within the village

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues walking along the fenced dirt path as a wooden gallows with a hanged figure comes into view in the distance. He passes the grim structure around the 32-second mark, and the distant village with its thatched-roof houses becomes more prominent through the haze, with dark smoke visibly rising from somewhere within the settlement.

events.description: village buildings become prominent as the path approaches the settlement
passing damaged wooden structures at the village edge

agents.ego_description: approaching the village entrance where smoke suggests recent damage or fire

entered.detail: traditional medieval cottages with straw thatching
burned or collapsed wooden building with charred remains
opening into the village with visible pathways between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching the village entrance, with thatched-roof cottages and damaged wooden structures becoming prominent. Black smoke rises prominently from the left side of the village, suggesting a recent fire or attack. The path leads directly into the settlement, with the wooden fence continuing alongside as the buildings close in around the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from a grim site of execution to a smoke-filled medieval village. It begins with Geralt standing beside a large dead tree draped with hanged bodies, moving forward as the macabre landmark recedes and the path opens up between wooden fences and grasslands. As he continues along the trail, the scene shifts to reveal a lone wooden gallows in the distance, which he passes while the hazy outlines of thatched-roof houses become more prominent. The camera then follows him toward the village entrance, where the environment closes in with damaged wooden structures and cottages. Finally, the path leads directly into the settlement as thick black smoke rises prominently from the left, signaling a recent disaster.
